Home / Compare / vs Metabase
Compare

DataVision Pro vs Metabase

Updated 2026-04-21

DataVision Pro is a hosted AI analytics platform focused on uploading a file and getting cleaned data, statistics, ML, and AI insights immediately. Metabase is an open-source self-service BI tool that points at your database and lets non-engineers build questions and dashboards in a friendly UI. Pick DataVision Pro for AI-first file analysis; pick Metabase for self-hosted dashboards over a SQL database.

Best for DataVision Pro

Analysts who upload files and want AI-explained cleaning, stats, and ML without hosting infrastructure.

Best for Metabase

Teams with a Postgres / MySQL / warehouse who want self-service exploration and dashboards on top of it.

Side-by-side comparison

FeatureDataVision ProMetabase
Primary use case Ad-hoc file analysis with AI Self-service BI on a SQL database
Hosting Hosted SaaS Self-host (open-source) or Metabase Cloud
Source data CSV / Excel uploads Direct connection to 20+ databases
Auto data cleaning Built-in toggleable cleaning pipeline Not really — Metabase assumes the warehouse is already clean
AI features GPT-powered chat + auto-generated reports Metabot AI for natural-language questions [verify against current Metabase tier]
Built-in ML K-Means + RandomForest + linear models None — relies on SQL and your warehouse's ML if any
Pricing 60-day free Tier 3 trial; tiered free access Open-source free; Pro and Enterprise editions per Metabase pricing
Best for Analysts working from extracts Engineering-adjacent teams with a database
Learning curve No SQL required Question-builder is no-code; deeper analysis often requires SQL

When to choose DataVision Pro

  • Your data lives in CSV/Excel exports, not a queryable database.
  • You want AI to explain and summarise every chart automatically.
  • You need cleaning + stats + ML in one place without hosting anything.
  • You don't have an engineer available to install or maintain a BI server.

When to choose Metabase

  • You already run Postgres, MySQL, Snowflake, BigQuery, or Redshift.
  • You want a free, self-hosted BI layer your team can extend.
  • Your stakeholders are happy writing SQL or click-built questions.
  • You need fine-grained permissions and audit logs that come with self-hosting.

Frequently asked questions

Is Metabase free?

The open-source edition is free to self-host. Metabase Cloud and Pro/Enterprise editions add managed hosting, SSO, and advanced permissions at per-user pricing. [verify against current Metabase pricing]

Can DataVision Pro connect to my Postgres?

Today it consumes CSV/Excel uploads. Direct database connectors are on the roadmap. For now, export the slice you need and upload it.

Which is better for AI?

DataVision Pro builds GPT-powered analysis into every page by default. Metabase's Metabot is focused on natural-language SQL question generation; both are useful in different ways.

Can I use both?

Yes — Metabase is excellent for always-on dashboards over your warehouse; DataVision Pro is excellent for AI-driven deep-dives on the extracts your team needs to investigate.

Notes marked [verify] are pending confirmation against the latest official pricing or feature pages from Metabase. We never publish a number we can't source.

Try DataVision Pro on your own data

60-day Tier 3 trial. No credit card.

An intelligent data analytics platform that turns raw datasets into clear, actionable insights — in seconds, no code required.
